stimulus: In a 2022 study, Tomas Cabello and colleagues found that the slime mold Physarum polycephalum not only chooses between competing food sources but also revises its choice when one becomes contaminated. This evidence of an organism without a nervous system effectively "weighing options" suggests that decision making in nature may not be confined to ______blank systems.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. "Complex" means having many interconnected parts; the study shows even an organism lacking a nervous system can revise choices, suggesting decision making is not limited to elaborate, complex systems with brains.

Choice A is incorrect. "Fragile" describes vulnerability; the text doesn't address whether nervous systems are easily broken. Choice B is incorrect. "Territorial" describes defending an area; this is not the dimension under discussion. Choice D is incorrect. "Cooperative" describes mutual coordination among parts or organisms; the text is about whether brain-like organization is required for decision making.
